expectedEffect: Use one-for-one 6/5 EDD replenishment without an aging override; the locked five-case evaluation improves aggregate score by 104.763644 versus baseline and passes all seven outcome guardrails.
hypothesis: The commissioned fab can preserve urgent EDD ordering and hard on-time service with one-for-one replenishment, while omitting service aging because its current six-card workload does not need younger-lot preemption protection.
name: Identity-safe commissioned release control
